page: Vultr vcg-b200-248c-2826g-1536vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for extreme computational workloads. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel processor with 248 physical cores and 248 vCPUs, operating with a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 2826.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 11.4 GB of RAM per core.

The primary hardware highlight is the integration of eight NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 1536 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. For local storage requirements, the server includes 13312 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. It also comes provisioned with one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the massive GPU and memory footprint, this server is optimized for high-density resource allocation. While benchmark data is not available, the hardware profile is tailored for large-scale artificial intelligence workloads, deep learning training, massive LLM inference, and complex data science simulations.
description: Vultr vcg-b200-248c-2826g-1536vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for high-end computational tasks. It features an Intel x86_64 processor with 248 physical cores and 248 vCPUs, paired with 2826.0 GB of system memory. The server's primary acceleration comes from eight NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs, providing a total of 1536 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a 13312 GB NVMe SSD, and the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This hardware profile is engineered for resource-intensive workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale artificial intelligence training, LLM inference, and advanced data science jobs.
og_description: Vultr vcg-b200-248c-2826g-1536vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server featuring 248 Intel vCPUs, 2826.0 GB of RAM, eight NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs with 1536 GB VRAM, and 13312 GB of NVMe SSD storage.

tagline: An ultra-high-density GPU server featuring eight Blackwell accelerators, massive system memory, and high-capacity NVMe storage for enterprise AI workloads.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs with 1536 GB total VRAM
248 Intel physical cores and vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
2826.0 GB of system memory providing 11.4 GB per core
13312 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Designed for large-scale AI training, LLM inference, and data science
